//: MCP server inventory for /srv/ai — single source of truth (tracked in git).
//_docs: https://github.com/open-webui/mcpo — Claude-Desktop mcpServers format. Edit + hot-reload picks it up.
//_note: The mcpo image ships uv (uvx). Node-based servers (npx) require a node-enabled image; start with uvx servers.

git.//: Repo is mounted read-only at /repos/ai-server (see docker-compose mcpo volumes). Read ops work; commit/add/checkout fail by design on the RO mount.
git.//_safe: GIT_CONFIG_* env marks the mounted repo as safe (container user != host owner uid), avoiding git's 'dubious ownership' error without writing any host files.

plan-build.//: In-house planner->coder pipeline (docker/mcpo/plan_build_mcp.py, mounted at /config). Tools: make_plan, plan_and_build, implement_spec. Calls the LiteLLM gateway via host.docker.internal:4000; reads LITELLM_MASTER_KEY from inherited env (set via the mcpo service env_file) so no secret lives here.
plan-build.//_deps: uv creates an ephemeral venv with the `mcp` package on first launch; UV_CACHE_DIR points at a writable path since /config is read-only.

comfyui.//: Image/media generation via the (vendored) joenorton/comfyui-mcp-server, run natively as a streamable-http service (scripts/comfyui-mcp.service) on the host at :9000, talking to native ComfyUI at :8188. mcpo proxies it to Open WebUI + agents. Style workflows live in config/comfyui-mcp/workflows/. Tools: z_image_turbo (+ any style file), generate_image, run_workflow, get_job, view_image, list_assets, regenerate, cancel_job, etc.
